text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out to meet up with<n>Matikanefukukitaru on my
day off,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhh!
choice_data_list: What's wrong?!
What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
F-finally! It really happened! I got ten<n>"great
fortunes" in a row from my<n>fortune slip key chain!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This racewear must be boosting my<n>good luck! No
doubt about it!
choice_data_list: You think your racewear helped?
You think your racewear helped?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! With all these four-leaf<n>clovers,
amulets, and good-luck<n>charms, this racewear is
packed with<n>fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was going to give it a spin around<n>town to test
out its power, but I think<n>it's already good to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to put this overwhelming<n>abundance of
luck to good use today!
choice_data_list: Maybe you could help someone out?
Maybe you could help someone out?
Give me some of that luck, please!
Give me some of that luck, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to put this overwhelming<n>abundance of
luck to good use today!
choice_data_list: Maybe you could help someone out?
Maybe you could help someone out?
Give me some of that luck, please!
Give me some of that luck, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's a great idea! Now to find<n>someone in
need of some help...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Wh-what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I didn't think it'd be that easy!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Sob! Where did he go?! Lucky!Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After asking the young girl a few<n>questions, we
learn that she<n>accidentally let go of her pet dog's
leash during their walk.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: With a name like Lucky, this canonly be the work of fate!
choice_data_list: This definitely sounds like a job for you.
This definitely sounds like a job for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Matikanefukukitaru is on the<n>job! I'll find
your little Lucky in no<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You can count on it! Luck follows me<n>wherever I
go, so little Lucky should<n>be no different!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Dogs get along with other dogs, and I<n>just happen
to have a lion-dog charm<n>in my bag! You know,
like the statues<n>you see at all the shrines!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now to commence the divination! I'll<n>just put this
here, and... Woof, woof!<n>Bow wow! Shiba Inu,
Chow Chow!

text_block_list.name: Shiba Inu
text_block_list.text: Pitter, patter... Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhh! Hey, gimme back my<n>lion-dog!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A Shiba Inu suddenly runs up,<n>snatches up the
lion-dog charm, and<n>scampers off.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Wait! That dog has a leash on it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What if that's Lucky?! Let's hurry<n>and find out!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We give chase, following Lucky until<n>he plants
himself down just outside<n>of a shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If we get any closer, Lucky<n>might run into
the mall and cause a<n>scene...
choice_data_list: Do you have any animal-summoning charms?
Do you have any animal-summoning charms?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I have a spell that can<n>project my
thoughts telepathically,<n>but I've never tried it on a
dog<n>before...
choice_data_list:
I know you can make it work with all that lucky
power you have!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! All the luck in the<n>universe is with
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Doberoo, mastifoo,<n>malamoo, ho...
Labradoo, rottweiloo,<n>spanieloo, go!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't say if the telepathy worked,<n>but about ten
minutes later, Lucky<n>walks close enough for us to
grab<n>hold of his leash.

text_block_list.name: Lucky
text_block_list.text: Whine...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text:
Lucky! You're back! Thank you so<n>much for the
help!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. Hehe, guess we<n>were quite
lucky in finding him, huh?
choice_data_list: You are the Umamusume goddess of luck, after all.
You are the Umamusume goddess of luck, after all.

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Really?! That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Uh, well... Heh, hehehe! I wouldn't go<n>that far...
choice_data_list: Praise be to the great Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Praise be! Umm... Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, if you ever need any<n>more help, leave
it to me and my<n>super-lucky powers to work
things<n>out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I went a little too far with that<n>bit... How
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I was so happy hearing all<n>those
compliments. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'd say this outfit's lucky<n>powers are
now officially certified!<n>It's definitely coming with
me for my<n>next race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You never know, maybe we'll meet<n>that girl there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What?! You want some of my power?
choice_data_list: Please, I beg you! Just a smidge!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm... Even if you beg, I don't really<n>know...
choice_data_list: I beseech thee, Goddess Matikanefukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Now, how could I say no to<n>that?! Your
wish is my command!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll just sprinkle a little bit of<n>my power on
this charm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom, hum, hum, doopee-dee!<n>There you go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This charm here is a special one. With<n>this, you'll
always end up with a<n>raffle-winning popsicle stick
after<n>finishing your icy treat!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: What an oddly specific power.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...All the same, I take my newly<n>imbued charm for
a test-drive and<n>buy myself a popsicle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You won! Congratulations! Hehe,<n>looks like my
charm's working just<n>as advertised, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Woo! Another winner!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And... another one?!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
There's no way we only have<n>winners... That
would be crazy...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Amid the confusion, a man wobbles<n>into the store
on the verge of<n>collapse.

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: Please... give me... a popsicle...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh... I'm sorry, but... we kinda just<n>bought all of
the popsicles...

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: You what?! Gyahhh! Thud.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek! A-are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Hurry, give him one of your<n>popsicles!

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I thought I was a goner.<n>Please, let me
repay your kindness...

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: In return for a popsicle... Yes, this will<n>do.

text_block_list.name: Man in Ragged Clothes
text_block_list.text: Here, take this box. Thank you, and<n>farewell.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: There he goes... What do you think is<n>inside?
choice_data_list: Let's open it and see.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, Trainer! What if this is<n>a trap?! Like
a Pandora's box<n>situation!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No way! A shiny blue smartphone?!<n>And it's
unopened!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I-it's the newest model too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me... The charm isn'tlimited to just popsicles, but anythingthat begins with the letter p, like"phone"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer, there is more to be done!
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It only took one charm to get all this!<n>Just imagine
what would happen with<n>two charms, or even
three!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is a huge chance for us! Let's<n>get a whole
boatload of charms for<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... If you have this charm,<n>you'll never
misplace your loose<n>change! And this one helps
you split<n>disposable chopsticks perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, this is way too much trouble!<n>Let's just get
'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I trudge through town like some kind<n>of decorated
officer, covered<n>head-to-toe in lucky charms. I'm
not<n>quite sure what my accomplishments<n>are,
however.
